questions.question: 10 (a) A cloud chamber can be used to detect α (alpha)-particles and β (beta)-particles. Alcohol in the cloud chamber exists as a vapour and condenses on ions produced in the air. This forms visible tracks. Fig. 10.1 shows the tracks when a source of α-particles and β-particles is present in the cloud chamber. cloud chamber alcohol vapour in air source of α-particles and β-par
